properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v3 v4 v5 v3 v3 v6 v6 v7 v3 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: At break of day, in hope we rise We speak Your Name, we lift our eyes Tune our hearts into Your beat Where we walk, there You'll be With fire in our eyes, our lives a-light

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your love untamed, it's blazing out The streets will glow forever bright Your glory's breaking through the night

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You will never fade away, Your love is here to stay By my side, in my life, Shining through me everyday

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You wake within me, wake within me You're in my heart forever You wake within me, wake within me You're in my heart forever

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: With fire in our eyes, our lives a-light Your love untamed, it's blazing out The streets will glow forever bright Your glory's breaking through the night

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You wake within me, wake within me You're in my heart forever

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Forever, forever, forever in Your love Forever, forever, forever in Your love Forever, forever, forever in Your love Forever, forever, forever we know that…
